title: Dhama Chauk Chidiya
instruments: tabla, flute, tanpura, soft electronic pads
poem_text:
Dhama chauk chidiya bol,
Tippan toppan thol thol.

Ghoda gaadi dhool udaye,
Billi bani sher ki maaye.

Paani mein halla gulla,
Machhli ne khela dhaani phulla.

Chand ka thaila jhoola jheela,
Taaron ne phenka phuljhadi neela.

Ghar se nikla gubbara sa,
Uda le gaya dholak ka bhes.
cover_context: A surreal moonlit square where oversized birds juggle glowing, floating objects against a starry sky.
